raw_model_output.description: A pinned JSON blob shaped exactly like what P-EXTRACT (ai/prompts/P-EXTRACT.v1.md) returns for one clause — see backend/services/extraction/schemas.py::ExtractedObligation for the shape it must validate against.

expected.description: ExtractedObligation.model_validate(input.raw_model_output).model_dump(mode='json') — the runner fails if these ever diverge, which is exactly the regression this guards against: a schema change or provider bug silently altering what a clause extracts to.
